Tools for configuring and integrating various compilers, languages, and build systems in the Waf environment.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initialization file for the `waflib/Tools` directory in the `pebble-firmware` codebase.
- **[ar.py](ar.py.md)**: Tool for finding and configuring the `ar` program to support static libraries in C/C++ projects.
- **[asm.py](asm.py.md)**: Assembly support for compiling and linking asm files using tools like gas and nasm.
- **[bison.py](bison.py.md)**: Integration of the Bison code generator into the build system, compiling Bison files to C/C++ files.
- **[c.py](c.py.md)**: Tools and classes for compiling and linking C programs, shared libraries, and static libraries.
- **[c_aliases.py](c_aliases.py.md)**: Defines functions and aliases for creating C/C++ programs, libraries, and object files based on file extensions.
- **[c_config.py](c_config.py.md)**: C/C++/D configuration helpers for parsing flags, validating configurations, and managing defines in Waf build scripts.
- **[c_osx.py](c_osx.py.md)**: Tools and tasks for creating MacOS applications and bundles using the Waf build system.
- **[c_preproc.py](c_preproc.py.md)**: C/C++ preprocessor for dependency tracking, handling macros, includes, and conditional compilation.
- **[c_tests.py](c_tests.py.md)**: Configuration tests for linking libraries, inline macros, large file support, and endianness detection.
- **[ccroot.py](ccroot.py.md)**: Shared classes and methods for tools supporting C-like languages, including task generation and linking functionalities.
- **[clang.py](clang.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Clang C compiler and related tools in the build environment.
- **[clangxx.py](clangxx.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Clang++ C++ compiler for the build environment.
- **[compiler_c.py](compiler_c.py.md)**: Detects and configures a suitable C compiler for various platforms using Waf build system tools.
- **[compiler_cxx.py](compiler_cxx.py.md)**: Detects and configures a suitable C++ compiler from a list of supported compilers for various platforms.
- **[compiler_d.py](compiler_d.py.md)**: Detects and configures a suitable D compiler from a list of supported compilers.
- **[compiler_fc.py](compiler_fc.py.md)**: Detects and configures a suitable Fortran compiler for different platforms in the build environment.
- **[cs.py](cs.py.md)**: C# support for the Waf build system, including tasks for compiling, debugging, and documenting C# code.
- **[cxx.py](cxx.py.md)**: Base for C++ programs and libraries, including tasks for compiling and linking object files.
- **[d.py](d.py.md)**: Tools and tasks for compiling and linking D language files in the Waf build system.
- **[d_config.py](d_config.py.md)**: Configures platform-specific flags and detects the D standard library type for D programs.
- **[d_scan.py](d_scan.py.md)**: Scanner for finding dependencies in D language files by parsing and filtering comments.
- **[dbus.py](dbus.py.md)**: Compiles dbus files using dbus-binding-tool with methods for adding and processing dbus files.
- **[dmd.py](dmd.py.md)**: Configuration and flag settings for D compilers dmd, dmd2, and ldc in the Pebble firmware.
- **[errcheck.py](errcheck.py.md)**: Error-checking tool for Waf build system to identify common mistakes and typos in build scripts.
- **[fc.py](fc.py.md)**: Fortran support in the Waf build system, including tasks for compiling and linking Fortran code.
- **[fc_config.py](fc_config.py.md)**: Fortran configuration helpers for setting flags, checking compiler settings, and detecting OpenMP support.
- **[fc_scan.py](fc_scan.py.md)**: Parses Fortran files to identify dependencies, including modules and include files.
- **[flex.py](flex.py.md)**: Integration of the flex code generator into the build system, supporting C and C++ file generation.
- **[g95.py](g95.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the G95 Fortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[gas.py](gas.py.md)**: Detects and configures assembly compilers gas/as/gcc for building assembly files.
- **[gcc.py](gcc.py.md)**: Configuration and detection of GCC/LLVM compilers with platform-specific settings for various operating systems.
- **[gdc.py](gdc.py.md)**: Configuration and flag settings for the GDC compiler in the Pebble firmware build system.
- **[gfortran.py](gfortran.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the gfortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[glib2.py](glib2.py.md)**: Support for GLib2 tools including marshal, enums, gsettings, and gresource with related task methods.
- **[gnu_dirs.py](gnu_dirs.py.md)**: Defines and configures standard GNU directory variables for installation paths in a build environment.
- **[gxx.py](gxx.py.md)**: Detection and configuration of g++/llvm compilers with platform-specific settings.
- **[icc.py](icc.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Intel C compiler in the build environment.
- **[icpc.py](icpc.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Intel C++ compiler for the build environment.
- **[ifort.py](ifort.py.md)**: Configuration and setup scripts for detecting and configuring Intel Fortran compilers in a build system.
- **[intltool.py](intltool.py.md)**: Support for translation tools like msgfmt and intltool, including task creation for processing and installing translation files.
- **[irixcc.py](irixcc.py.md)**: Compiler configuration for the irix/MIPSpro cc compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[javaw.py](javaw.py.md)**: Java build tool integration for compiling Java code, creating JAR files, and generating Javadoc using Waf.
- **[ldc2.py](ldc2.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the ldc2 D compiler, including program detection and flag settings.
- **[lua.py](lua.py.md)**: Lua support for compiling *.lua files into *.luac files using the luac compiler.
- **[md5_tstamp.py](md5_tstamp.py.md)**: Re-calculates MD5 hashes of files based on file time changes, with optional content-based hashing.
- **[msvc.py](msvc.py.md)**: Support for Microsoft Visual C++ and Intel C++ compilers in the Waf build system, including detection and configuration of various compiler versions and platforms.
- **[nasm.py](nasm.py.md)**: Nasm tool for assembly processing, including configuration and compatibility functions.
- **[nobuild.py](nobuild.py.md)**: Overrides build commands to create empty files for profiling and evaluating Python overhead.
- **[perl.py](perl.py.md)**: Support for building Perl extensions with a C/C++ compiler, including version and module checks.
- **[python.py](python.py.md)**: Support for Python in the build system, including detection of headers and libraries, and configuration for embedding and extending Python in C/C++ programs.
- **[qt5.py](qt5.py.md)**: Tool for finding and configuring Qt5 and Qt6 tools and libraries, with support for building C++ projects using Qt features.
- **[ruby.py](ruby.py.md)**: Support for building Ruby extensions with checks for Ruby version, module availability, and development environment.
- **[suncc.py](suncc.py.md)**: Configuration and detection of the Sun C compiler with necessary flags for the Waf build system.
- **[suncxx.py](suncxx.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Sun C++ compiler with necessary flags and settings.
- **[tex.py](tex.py.md)**: Support for compiling TeX/LaTeX documents with various tools and handling dependencies in the Waf build system.
- **[vala.py](vala.py.md)**: Tools and methods for integrating the Vala compiler into the Waf build system, including task generation and configuration checks.
- **[waf_unit_test.py](waf_unit_test.py.md)**: Unit testing system for C/C++/D and interpreted languages with parallel and selective test execution.
- **[wafcache.py](wafcache.py.md)**: Filesystem-based cache system for sharing and reusing build artifacts with support for various storage backends.
- **[winres.py](winres.py.md)**: Processes .rc files for C/C++ by compiling them into .res or .rc.o files using winrc tasks.
- **[xlc.py](xlc.py.md)**: Configuration and flag settings for detecting and using the Aix C compiler with Waf build system.
- **[xlcxx.py](xlcxx.py.md)**: Configuration and flag settings for detecting and using the Aix C++ compiler in the Waf build system.
